name: schema-registry-dag-dag-cycle-detector
description: T191 DagCycleDetector — VALIDATION archetype (inline). THREE-COLOR DFS: WHITE→GRAY on entry, GRAY→BLACK on exit. GRAY re-encounter = CYCLE_DETECTED. Single visited Set cannot distinguish back edges.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: three-color DFS algorithm, WHITE/GRAY/BLACK state machine, back-edge detection via GRAY re-encounter, inline call contract
Retrieve VALIDATION arch pattern + three-color-dfs + cycle-detection + back-edge-detection patterns for T191
Break T191 into: initialize WHITE map → DFS traverse → mark GRAY on entry → recurse neighbors → mark BLACK on exit → detect GRAY re-encounter as CYCLE_DETECTED → return boolean

Generate dag-cycle-detector.service.ts — THREE-COLOR DFS using Map<nodeId, 'WHITE'|'GRAY'|'BLACK'>. WHITE=unvisited, GRAY=in-stack, BLACK=completed. GRAY re-encounter triggers CYCLE_DETECTED. Single Set<visited> is WRONG — cannot distinguish back edges. checkCycle() pure function, no state stored between calls.
Named check validation: three_color_map_used, white_to_gray_on_entry, gray_to_black_on_exit, gray_reencounter_is_cycle, no_single_visited_set
Score generated code 0-100 against T191 iron rules: three-color DFS correctness, back-edge detection, no false positives from cross edges
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
